summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Niche Trend Intelligence Copilot with Channel Analysis feature. All functionality working perfectly. ResizeObserver issue from previous iteration has been successfully resolved. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI fully operational with seamless integration.
passed_tests: Backend API health check and root endpoint
POST /api/trends endpoint with all 5 niches (Coding, Finance, Fitness, Gaming, Education)
POST /api/analyse endpoint with Gemini AI integration and proper response structure
POST /api/channel-analyse endpoint with full channel analysis and AI insights
Error handling for invalid niches, missing data, invalid video IDs, and invalid channel URLs
Tab switching between 'Niche Trends' and 'Channel Analysis' modes
Niche selector dropdown functionality with all data-testids
Fetch Trends button with proper loading states and API integration
Video cards display with thumbnails, metadata, and click functionality
Video analysis modal with AI-generated insights and proper data-testids
Channel URL input with validation and format support
Channel analysis with complete results display including analytics and AI insights
Modal close functionality and state management
Responsive design and dark theme implementation
Console error monitoring - no ResizeObserver or webpack overlay issues
All required data-testid attributes present and functional

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 17 API tests passed including new channel analysis endpoints
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI components and integrations working perfectly
